metadata.title: Gasparro Fotografia | Wedding Photography
metadata.description: Photography studio specializing in weddings, maternity and newborns in Puglia and Italy. Modern and sophisticated photography.

navigation.logoAlt: Gasparro Fotografie Logo - Photography studio specializing in weddings

intro.title: EVERY DETAIL SPEAKS OF YOU:
intro.description: Our studio is in constant pursuit of Beauty. As a Wedding Photographer in Puglia, our vision of photography and video is Modern & Sophisticated, capturing with spontaneity every detail and every person with poetic sensitivity and an editorial touch. It will be an immersive journey into the beauty of your event, because you deserve a unique memory that lives forever.
intro.descriptionMobile: Modern and sophisticated photography, with poetic sensitivity and an editorial touch. Every moment of your day, treasured forever.
intro.subtitle: That is why we preserve your most genuine moments, so you can relive the love in every glance.
intro.subtitleMobile: To relive the love in every glance

parallax.description: At Gasparro Fotografia, we are committed to telling your story and that of your wedding day by naturally capturing the details, people and authentic interactions that make it unique.
parallax.descriptionMobile: We tell your story by capturing the details, people and authentic moments that make your wedding unique.

gallerySection.title: Our Shots
gallerySection.descriptionMobile: Emotions, details, unique moments. Your story, treasured forever.
gallerySection.description: We tell the magic of your most special day with shots that go beyond the image. We do not simply photograph: we capture emotions, details, unique moments that speak of you. A sudden smile, a gentle touch, a glance that says it all. Because your story deserves to be treasured forever.

weddings.title: Weddings
weddings.description: We capture every precious moment of your special day with artistic sensitivity and emotional depth.

maternity.title: Maternity
maternity.description: We celebrate the wonderful journey of maternity with elegant and intimate portraits that tell the story of anticipation and joy of this unique moment.

newborn.title: Newborns
newborn.description: Delicate and safe sessions that immortalize the first moments of life. Artistic portraits that preserve the miracle of birth with tenderness and care.

finalSection.title: THE NEXT CHAPTER IS
finalSection.subtitle: Discover the opportunities created for you

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro1: Information on the processing of personal data (art. 13 of Law 196/03) for the website
privacyPolicy.intro2: by Donato Gasparro. The information on this page summarizes the privacy and personal data protection policies of Donato Gasparro, the company that owns the website
privacyPolicy.intro3: . This notice is provided pursuant to art. 13 of Legislative Decree No. 196/2003 – Personal Data Protection Code – to those who interact with the web services of Donato Gasparro, accessible at the web address
privacyPolicy.intro4: . This policy does not apply to other websites accessible through our links, for which Donato Gasparro is in no way responsible.
privacyPolicy.section1Text: The data controller is Donato Gasparro, Photography Studio: Fotografia Gasparro, located at Piazza XX Settembre, 15, Martina Franca 74015, Puglia, Italy, reachable by email: info@gasparrofotografia.it.
privacyPolicy.section2Text: This notice applies to the website www.gasparrofotografia.it and describes how personal data provided by users through the contact form is processed. The policy does not apply to other linked websites, for which the studio is not responsible.
privacyPolicy.section3Text: Through the contact form, the following data may be collected: first and last name, email address, mobile number and any other data voluntarily provided by the user in the message.
privacyPolicy.section4Text: Data collected through the contact form will be used exclusively to respond to contact requests from clients (e.g. brides or clients interested in photography services) and to maintain email correspondence until the discussion is concluded. Data will not be used for marketing purposes nor shared with third parties, except as required by law.
privacyPolicy.section5Text: Processing is based on the performance of pre-contractual measures at the request of the data subject (art. 6, paragraph 1, letter b of the GDPR). No consent via checkbox is required to submit the form.
privacyPolicy.section6Text: Data will be retained only for as long as necessary to respond to requests and maintain email correspondence. Beyond this period, data will not be stored.
privacyPolicy.section7Text: Data is processed using electronic tools and appropriate security measures to prevent loss, unauthorized access or unlawful use.
privacyPolicy.section8Text: The website does not use profiling cookies or external tracking systems.
privacyPolicy.section9Text: Photos taken by the studio may be used for advertising purposes on the website, social media and promotional materials. The copyright of the photos belongs to Donato Gasparro / Photography Studio Fotografia Gasparro. Any images of clients will only be published with their explicit consent.
privacyPolicy.section10Text: Users of www.gasparrofotografia.it have the right, at any time, to obtain confirmation of whether or not personal data concerning them exists, to know its content and origin, to verify its accuracy or to request its integration, updating or correction. They also have the right to request its deletion, restriction of processing or to object, for legitimate reasons, to its processing, as well as to exercise – where applicable – the right to data portability. To exercise these rights, please contact the Data Controller by sending a message to info@gasparrofotografia.it.
